name: El Torito Chicken and Lime Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chicken breasts until fully cooked and shred them.
2. Peel, pit, and slice the avocado.
3. Combine the stock, lime juice, oregano, basil, pureed chipotle, and bay leaf in a stockpot.
4. Season with salt and white pepper to taste.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Add the shredded chicken, tomatoes, red onion, and cilantro.
7. Return the shredded chicken to the pot and bring to a boil again.
8. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
9. Adjust seasonings as needed.
10. Ladle the hot soup into warm bowls.
11. Drop in cheese cubes, garnish with tortilla strips, avocado slices, lime slice, and cilantro sprig.
12. Makes about 1 quart.
